top_signals.title: Iran threatens to extend conflict ‘beyond the region’ if U.S. and Israel resume attacks
top_signals.summary: Iran's Revolutionary Guard on Wednesday threatened to extend the Middle East conflict "beyond the region" if the U.S. and Israel resume attacks against Tehran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Two Chinese VLCCs Exit Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Two Chinese supertankers carrying 4 million barrels of Middle East crude oil exited the Strait of Hormuz on Wednesday after waiting in the Gulf for more than two months, shipping data on LSEG and Kpler showed.The ships are among a handful of supertankers carrying Iraqi crude exiting the Gulf this mo
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Sherritt drops plan to dissolve Cuban assets
top_signals.summary: The announcement comes just days after Sherritt said it would be dissolving the 50/50 Moa joint venture.
